description: A plain candid color photograph (no on-image text, slogans, or graphic overlays) taken inside an industrial training facility or shop floor. A woman in a green blazer, white hard hat with an official seal, and glasses (apparently a Department of Labor official, likely Secretary of Labor) is shaking hands with a young blonde woman wearing safety glasses and a green hard hat decorated with stickers, plus a gray T-shirt. Lined up to either side are several young tradespeople/apprentices wearing hard hats of various colors (white, brown with stickers, blue numbered '38' and '51'), safety glasses, and work clothes; a man in a blue polo stands at far left. Industrial shelving, scaffolding, and equipment fill the background. This is a documentary event photo of an official greeting trade workers, not a designed meme/poster. (The accompanying tweet promotes putting American workers first.)
